subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is no God but Him and that the Point of the Bayan is His servant, His Glory, His Might and His Sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و ان نقطه البیان لعبده و بهائه و عزه و سلطانه و
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
